bullets: INTENSE GAMEPLAY – Get ready for thrilling action! This whack a mole game challenges kids with fast-paced, reflex-testing gameplay. Perfect for boys and girls age 4 and up to keep them engaged and entertained.
ELECTRONIC SCOREBOARD – Keep track of your score with the built-in electronic scoreboard, making this arcade game for kids even more exciting!
FUN LIGHT-UP EFFECTS – The flashing lights add an extra layer of excitement, bringing the game to life and keeps children engaged for longer.
HILARIOUS SOUNDS – Add even more fun to the action with hilarious sounds that make every whack a memorable moment. This game will have kids laughing and playing again and again.
GREAT GIFT FOR YOUNG PLAYERS – This whack a mole game is the perfect gift, combining fun, skill-building, and excitement all in one!
content.description: Check out the Bladez Arcade Whack-a-Mole! You'll need fast reflexes for this crazy intense electronic game with lights and hilarious sounds! The electronic scoreboard keeps track of your score - who will you go head to head with?

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Whack-A-Mole Electronic Game, 1 x Hammer, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.

_meta.source_file: New Item Setup Sheet 2025 - Bladez Toyz (January 2026).xlsx
